question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not enumerate or label the main sections or chapters of the thesis. It merely describes what will be done in general terms, so a reader cannot identify distinct parts such as "Ievads", "Teorētiskā daļa", "Praktiskā daļa" etc.

question: Description
feedback: The paragraph gives a broad overview of the tasks (analysis of methods, practical hiding of data) but does not provide a concise description of the contents of each individual section or chapter. Detailed outlines or summaries of each part are missing.

question: Structure
feedback: Although it hints at a theoretical analysis followed by a practical implementation, the overall organization of the thesis (e.g., number of chapters, subsections, flow between them) is not made explicit. Therefore the general structure cannot be easily inferred.
